rationale.D1: Confirmed standard command-based pattern with SubsystemBase classes holding vendor hardware directly (SparkMax in L4Arm, Pigeon2 in SwerveBase); no *IO interfaces or swappable implementations exist anywhere in the codebase.
rationale.D2: CoralHandlerCommand implements a real 11-state enum FSM (IDLE, L1_INTAKING, L4_SCORING, PERFORMING_HANDOFF, CLIMBING, etc.) with explicit switch-case transitions coordinating two arms and a climber; discounted full D2=3 because there is no separate Superstructure goal-fanout — the FSM is embedded in a single giant Command.
rationale.D3: SwerveBase.simulationPeriodic() is an empty stub (line 621) and the only physics present is a gyro angle integrator (angle += omega * dt) for sim; no WPILib physics sim classes (ElevatorSim, SingleJointedArmSim) are used anywhere.
rationale.D4: No test files found anywhere in src/test across either robot project (Knight or Tharp); D4=0 confirmed.
rationale.D5: Heavy SmartDashboard.put* throughout all subsystems (SwerveBase periodic alone has ~25 putNumber/putBoolean calls); no AdvantageKit, DogLog, Epilogue, or structured logging framework present.
rationale.D6: Choreo AutoFactory is wired in RobotContainer and Autos.java with AutoRoutine/AutoTrajectory loading named .traj files from disk and driving via swerve.followTrajectory(); a dynamic ModularAuto strings trajectory segments together at runtime; AlignToPose commands provide pose-align capability; discounted D6=4 because no repulsor/reactive avoidance exists.
rationale.D7: addVisionMeasurement is called with computed xyStds/angStds (tag-distance-squared / numTargets scaling) and angular rejection logic for two Limelights (bow+stern) in SwerveBase.periodic(); multi-camera fusion confirmed at lines 568-569; discounted D7=3 because no TimeInterpolatableBuffer and no separate RobotState class — pose estimation lives directly in SwerveBase.
rationale.D8: README.md exists but is one line ('Robot code for FRC 2026 season'); two robot variants (Knight/Tharp) in the same monorepo is a notable sustainability artifact; no CI workflows (.github/workflows) and no formatter config were found.

D1: Tharp/src/main/java/frc/robot/subsystems/L4Arm.java:46 — SparkMax held directly in L4Arm SubsystemBase, no IO interface
Tharp/src/main/java/frc/robot/subsystems/SwerveBase.java:61 — Pigeon2 imu field directly in SwerveBase, no abstraction
D3: Tharp/src/main/java/frc/robot/subsystems/SwerveBase.java:576-580 — gyro angle integrator only, no physics classes
D4: No src/test/java directory found in Knight or Tharp
D5: Tharp/src/main/java/frc/robot/subsystems/SwerveBase.java:507-617 — ~25 SmartDashboard.put* calls in periodic(), no structured logging
D6: Tharp/src/main/java/frc/robot/commands/Autos.java:21-25 — choreo.auto.AutoFactory, AutoRoutine, AutoTrajectory imports actively used
Tharp/src/main/java/frc/robot/commands/Autos.java:160-218 — ModularAuto dynamically loads and chains Choreo .traj files by name
D7: Tharp/src/main/java/frc/robot/subsystems/SwerveBase.java:447-493 — addVisionMeasurement with xyStds/angStds computed from tag distance and count, rejection on z-error and angular error
D8: FRC2026/ — Knight/ and Tharp/ subdirectories represent two physical robot variants in one repo
